title: ortholoma dielsii
intro: Ortholoma dielsii, also known as the Diels' ortholoma, is a plant species of the family Boraginaceae, native to China. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and infection prevention. The health benefits of Ortholoma dielsii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Ortholoma dielsii is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
